---
title: "Quote of the day" 
description: "If something's important enough, you should try. Even if probable outcome is failure. - Elon Musk "
date: 2021-02-09T09:45:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: []
comments: false
---

[Entrepreneurs: 5 Things We Can Learn From Elon Musk](https://www.forbes.com/sites/richwinley/2015/10/08/entrepreneurs-5-things-we-can-learn-from-elon-musk/?sh=386a11640981)

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC
